title: Scytalia informis
taxonomy: Scytalia informis is a species of wasp in the family Ichneumonidae. It is a type of parasitic wasp that is known to be a natural enemy of certain species of caterpillars. The classification of Scytalia informis places it within the order Hymenoptera. This order includes over 150,000 known species, with Scytalia informis being just one of the many parasitic wasp species found within it. Further classification of Scytalia informis would place it within the family Ichneumonidae, which is a diverse group of wasps known for their parasitic behavior.
